active_conflicts: Iraqi PMF vs US bases in Iraq
negotiation_status: COLLAPSED - Iran rejected Trump's claim of talks and 5-day ceasefire. No active negotiations.

key_events_timeline.event: Operation Epic Fury launched - 900 strikes in 12 hours
Ayatollah Ali Khamenei assassinated in Israeli airstrike
Iran retaliates - 500+ ballistic missiles, 2000+ drones
Hezbollah opens Lebanon front
Mojtaba Khamenei installed as new Supreme Leader by IRGC
Iran announces 3 demands to end war
Israel warns US: critically low on interceptors
Israel kills Ali Larijani, IRGC Commander Pakpour, Defense Minister
Israel strikes Iran Asaluyeh complex (South Pars gas field)
Iran retaliates: destroys Qatar Ras Laffan LNG (17% capacity), hits Kuwait/Saudi/UAE energy
Brent crude hits $119
Houthis declare 'all military options possible'
Trump announces 5-day pause on energy strikes via Truth Social
BREAKING: Iran REJECTS Trump's claim of talks and 5-day ceasefire. Denies any negotiations are taking place. No pause acknowledged.

Iran strikes towns near Israel's Dimona nuclear facility — 180 wounded (116 in Arad, 64 in Dimona). First time Iranian missiles penetrate Israeli air defenses near nuclear site. IAEA confirms no damage to reactor, no abnormal radiation.

Iran launches 2 intermediate-range ballistic missiles at Diego Garcia (US-UK base, Indian Ocean, 2000+ miles from Tehran). Missiles did not hit but demonstrated range capability reaching Western European capitals (Paris, Berlin, Rome). Iran denies, calls it 'false flag'.
Israel's Chief of Staff confirms Iran's missiles can reach European capitals. Sejjil-3 development (4,000km range) under testing.
Netanyahu claims Iran no longer has uranium enrichment capacity after strikes on nuclear sites.

China's MizarVision satellite company publicly releasing high-res imagery of US military positions (F-22s at Prince Sultan Air Base, carrier groups). US accuses China of enabling Iranian attacks via commercial satellite intelligence. China denies.
Al Jazeera reports Iran may be using China's BeiDou navigation system for missile guidance, bypassing GPS.

iran_cluster_munitions.description: Added to ballistic missile warheads, forces multiple interceptor engagements per missile

israel_interceptor_crisis.production_ramp: Deal signed Dec 2025 but takes years
israel_interceptor_crisis.asymmetry: Each Iranian salvo costs Israel 3-10x more to defend

energy_infrastructure_damage.iran_asaluyeh: 4 gas treatment plants damaged by Israeli drone strike (South Pars)

iran_3_demands.demand_2: Payment of reparations for damages caused
iran_3_demands.demand_3: Firm international guarantees against future aggression
iran_3_demands.ceasefire_position: Iran rejects temporary ceasefire — demands permanent end to war with guarantees

nuclear_status.iran_breakout_time_pre_war: Less than 1 week for enough HEU for one bomb (DIA assessment May 2025)
nuclear_status.iran_enriched_uranium_stockpile: Enough 60% enriched uranium for 12+ weapons if further enriched (ODNI Nov 2024)
nuclear_status.iran_enrichment_capacity_post_strikes: Netanyahu claims destroyed. IAEA says material 'probably still there'. Natanz struck but underground facilities may survive.
nuclear_status.dimona_strike_result: 180 wounded near Dimona. IAEA confirms no reactor damage, no radiation. But demonstrates Iran CAN target Israeli nuclear sites.
nuclear_status.iran_nuclear_weapon_status: Pre-war: could assemble a device in 6-12 months if decision made. Post-strikes: enrichment capacity degraded but not eliminated. Underground facilities may be intact.

iran_missile_drone_stockpile.fired_so_far: 500+ ballistic missiles, 2000+ drones (as of Mar 5, CENTCOM)
iran_missile_drone_stockpile.remaining_capacity: Analysts estimate 2-3 months of sustained operations
iran_missile_drone_stockpile.production_rate_missiles: Ongoing but slower than drone production. Dual-use facilities can be retooled.
iran_missile_drone_stockpile.iran_official_claim: IRGC says stockpile NOT depleted, production continues

iran_extended_range_capability.diego_garcia_strike: 2 IRBMs launched at Diego Garcia (3,500km from Iran). Did not hit but demonstrated range. Iran denies, claims false flag.
iran_extended_range_capability.european_range: Sejjil-2 (2,400km) can reach southeastern Europe. Sejjil-3 under development (4,000km) would reach Paris, Berlin, Rome.
iran_extended_range_capability.israel_chief_of_staff_statement: Iran's missiles can reach European capitals
iran_extended_range_capability.implication: Iran's deterrence now extends beyond Middle East to NATO territory

china_intelligence_support.satellite_imagery: Chinese company MizarVision publicly releasing high-res satellite imagery of US military positions (F-22s at Prince Sultan Air Base, carrier groups). Sub-1-meter resolution.
china_intelligence_support.jilin_1_constellation: China's Jilin-1 satellite network provides near-continuous surveillance of US operations in Middle East
china_intelligence_support.beidou_navigation: Reports suggest Iran may be using China's BeiDou navigation system for missile guidance, bypassing GPS
china_intelligence_support.us_accusation: Deputy NSA Jon Finer accused China of enabling Iranian attacks via commercial satellite intel. China denies.
china_intelligence_support.intelligence_value: Real-time tracking of US military assets allows Iran to time attacks and avoid air patrols

israel_air_defense_collapse.dimona_penetration: First time Iranian missiles penetrated air defenses near nuclear facility (March 21)
israel_air_defense_collapse.interceptor_status: Arrow 3, David's Sling, Iron Dome all critically depleted. IDF spokesman admitted failure to intercept 'not special or unfamiliar' missiles.
israel_air_defense_collapse.asymmetry_worsening: Iran's cheap missiles vs Israel's expensive interceptors — ratio now catastrophic. Each salvo degrades defense further.
israel_air_defense_collapse.production_gap: New interceptor production deal signed Dec 2025 but takes years to deliver. Israel entering defense gap.
